'''âl-l-m''' ('''kalalam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lager|lager]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-l-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lager|lager]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-l-m
|-
! Lemma
| kalalam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilalam|thilalam]] || [[word:jilalam|jilalam]] || [[word:shilalam|shilalam]] || [[word:kilalam|kilalam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulalam|thuthulalam]] || [[word:jujulalam|jujulalam]] || [[word:shushulalam|shushulalam]] || [[word:kukulalam|kukulalam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulalam|thulalam]] || [[word:julalam|julalam]] || [[word:shulalam|shulalam]] || [[word:kulalam|kulalam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulalam|thulalam]] || [[word:julalam|julalam]] || [[word:shulalam|shulalam]] || [[word:kulalam|kulalam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelalam|thelalam]] || [[word:jelalam|jelalam]] || [[word:shelalam|shelalam]] || [[word:kelalam|kelalam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholalam|thotholalam]] || [[word:jojolalam|jojolalam]] || [[word:shosholalam|shosholalam]] || [[word:kokolalam|kokolalam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholalam|tholalam]] || [[word:jolalam|jolalam]] || [[word:sholalam|sholalam]] || [[word:kolalam|kolalam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholalam|tholalam]] || [[word:jolalam|jolalam]] || [[word:sholalam|sholalam]] || [[word:kolalam|kolalam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlalam|thĂŠlalam]] || [[word:jĂŠlalam|jĂŠlalam]] || [[word:shĂŠlalam|shĂŠlalam]] || [[word:kĂŠlalam|kĂŠlalam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalalam|thathalalam]] || [[word:jajalalam|jajalalam]] || [[word:shashalalam|shashalalam]] || [[word:kakalalam|kakalalam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalalam|thalalam]] || [[word:jalalam|jalalam]] || [[word:shalalam|shalalam]] || [[word:kalalam|kalalam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalalam|thalalam]] || [[word:jalalam|jalalam]] || [[word:shalalam|shalalam]] || [[word:kalalam|kalalam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalalam|shalalam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalalam|goshalalam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalalam|gokishalalam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalalamnĂŒ|shalalamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalalamnknĂŒ|goshalalamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalalamnĂŒ|gokishalalamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalalamshĂ«|shalalamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalalamnkshĂ«|goshalalamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalalamshĂ«|gokishalalamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalalamro|shalalamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalalamnkro|goshalalamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalalamro|gokishalalamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalalamu|shalalamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalalamnkmu|goshalalamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalalamu|gokishalalamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalalamsher|shalalamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalalamnksher|goshalalamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalalamsher|gokishalalamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalalamng|shalalamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalalamnkng|goshalalamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalalamng|gokishalalamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalalamya|shalalamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalalamnkya|goshalalamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalalamya|gokishalalamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalalamyam|shalalamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalalamnkyam|goshalalamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalalamyam|gokishalalamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalalamnĂŒshĂ«|shalalamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalalamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshalalamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalalamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishalalamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalalamnĂŒro|shalalamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalalamnknĂŒro|goshalalamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalalamnĂŒro|gokishalalamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalalamnĂŒmu|shalalamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalalamnknĂŒmu|goshalalamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalalamnĂŒmu|gokishalalamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalalamshĂ«nĂŒ|shalalamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalalamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalalamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalalamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalalamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalalamshĂ«ro|shalalamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalalamnkshĂ«ro|goshalalamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalalamshĂ«ro|gokishalalamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalalamshĂ«mu|shalalamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalalamnkshĂ«mu|goshalalamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalalamshĂ«mu|gokishalalamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalalamronĂŒ|shalalamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalalamnkronĂŒ|goshalalamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalalamronĂŒ|gokishalalamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalalamroshĂ«|shalalamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalalamnkroshĂ«|goshalalamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalalamroshĂ«|gokishalalamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalalamromu|shalalamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalalamnkromu|goshalalamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalalamromu|gokishalalamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalalamunĂŒ|shalalamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalalamnkmunĂŒ|goshalalamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalalamunĂŒ|gokishalalamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalalamushĂ«|shalalamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalalamnkmushĂ«|goshalalamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalalamushĂ«|gokishalalamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalalamuro|shalalamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalalamnkmuro|goshalalamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalalamuro|gokishalalamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
